unresolved_fields.address: Legacy canonical decision Markdown does not carry accepted business addresses record-by-record; left null.
unresolved_fields.coordinates: No accepted canonical coordinates are present in the decision ledger; left null and proposed list-only rendering.
unresolved_fields.rating: Legacy decisions generally preserve qualitative, representative, unavailable, or conflicting rating states rather than one complete canonical platform tuple; left null.
unresolved_fields.branch: Branch distinctions are retained in names where written; structured branch is null because no separate canonical field exists.
unresolved_fields.aliases: No complete canonical alias field exists; left empty rather than inferred.

notes: All 1,650 manifest decision IDs were parsed exactly once and linked to evidence.
Practical is every scoreable record at or above the S60 floor that was not explicitly marked not ranked; access is represented as the completed snapshot current-acquisition state.
Non-Practical records are retained in Audit; no IDs are omitted.
The proposed projection is list-only because canonical accepted coordinates are absent.
